sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hamming_distance (id Int64, value1 Int64, value2 Int64);
INSERT INTO test_hamming_distance (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 111, 121);
UPDATE test_hamming_distance SET value1 = 100, value2 = 200 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitHammingDistance(value1, value2) AS hamming_distance FROM test_hamming_distance;
SELECT id, bitHammingDistance(value1, value2) AS distance FROM test_hamming_distance WHERE distance < 5;
